article_title: 用 Agent Skill 固化你的架构规范：从纠正 AI 到自己动手建一个 Scaffold 技能
core_theme: 用 Agent skill 把项目编码规范写成一个可复用的指令文件，让 AI 每次都按你的架构产出一致性代码，而不是通用的教程模板
reader_takeaway: 理解 Agent skill 的核心价值与适用场景，能独立构建一个 scaffold 类型的自定义技能
summary_angle: 把「写约定 → 建技能 → 一键生成一致代码」压缩成一张可读的叙事封面

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 'Why generic AI output never matches your codebase' 章节：AI 默认生成 controller 而项目用 minimal API，代码能编译但风格完全不对
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个杂乱、风格不统一的代码碎片区域，散落着错误的 controller、Swagger 等标记

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 'Building the skill, step by step' 章节：在 .claude/skills/ 下创建 SKILL.md，写入架构约定
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个展开的魔法卷轴/文档，上面写着架构规则（minimal API、Scalar、无 MediatR 等关键词简写）

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 'Running it: /scaffold-feature Products' 章节：一条命令生成完整 vertical slice
information_blocks.visual_idea: 从卷轴中涌出整齐一致的代码模块（endpoint、handler、validator 等 6 个文件），排列有序

main_metaphor: 一个童话风格的魔法建筑蓝图卷轴，打开后能自动「打印」出整齐划一的建筑模块——把「固化规范→自动产出」变成一本可读的故事书画面
primary_subject: 一个展开的大型魔法蓝图卷轴或工艺罗盘
subject_action: 卷轴展开后正在「产出」一排整齐一致的小型建筑模块（代表 .NET 代码切片），像童话工坊里的自动建造过程
composition: 居中主物体，左侧到右侧的斜向推进叙事
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: children's fairy-tale illustration, simple magical forms, friendly proportions, bright storybook palette, safe wonder
selected_style_reason: 随机选中（索引 38）；教程类内容用童话绘本的温暖亲和感降低技术门槛，用简化造型突出「规范→产出」的因果逻辑
style_safety_note: 使用泛儿童童话风格描述，不涉及特定绘本作者、工作室或品牌
draft_goal: 第一轮先验证：主隐喻（童话蓝图卷轴）是否成立、三个信息块是否可读、童话风格是否与教程主题和谐
revision_targets: 如果童话感过强冲淡技术主题，加强卷轴和代码模块的结构感
如果信息块看不清，加大标注区域
如果构图太满，减少背景装饰元素
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: Using an agent skill to encode your coding conventions so AI produces consistent architecture-aligned code instead of generic tutorial templates. The reader should quickly feel they can build their own scaffolding skill.

Summary angle: The journey from 'AI writes wrong code' to 'write conventions into a skill' to 'one command generates consistent code' compressed into a readable narrative cover.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-4 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- Problem: scattered, mismatched code fragments (wrong controllers, Swagger labels) on the left side, labeled with Chinese text
- Mechanism: an open magical blueprint scroll showing architecture rules (tiny shorthand: minimal API, Scalar, no MediatR) in the center, labeled with Chinese text
- Step: from the scroll emerge orderly, identical code modules (endpoint, handler, validator etc.) marching to the right, labeled with Chinese text

Main metaphor: A fairy-tale style magical architectural blueprint scroll that produces identical well-structured building blocks, making the conventions-to-output logic feel like a storybook workshop.
Subject: A large open magical blueprint scroll or craftsman compass, actively producing orderly code/structure blocks.
Composition/framing: Centered main object with left-to-right diagonal narrative progression. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: children's fairy-tale illustration, simple magical forms, friendly proportions, bright storybook palette, safe wonder. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: warm gold, soft blue, cream white, soft green.
Visible text policy: allow only 3 short Chinese labels, each at most 6 Chinese characters. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: neon cityscapes, cyberpunk purple-blue glow, floating chips, code rain, HUD overlays, generic robots, dashboards, fake terminals.
